Package com.pms.service

Class CompanyService

java.lang.Object
com.pms.service.CompanyService
@Service public class CompanyService extends Object
Represents the Company: holds all clients, employees, and projects, and implements the assignment / tracking / billing / feedback logic. Backed by in-memory maps so no database setup is required for the lab.
